title: Projektassistent:in für Infrastrukturprojekte
required_skills: Completed technical or commercial vocational training (Ausbildung) or comparable qualification
Experience in construction project management, project assistant, or comparable role
Structured, careful working style with strong organisational skills
Proficiency in standard Office applications; MS Project ideally
Knowledge of iTWO software (or willingness to learn)
Open team communication, cooperative work style
High service orientation toward internal and external project stakeholders
bonus_skills: Familiarity with iTWO construction management software
matched_skills: Project coordination and administrative support experience (Hapag-Lloyd, HSBC, ECE Group)
Meeting coordination and scheduling (ECE Group: client visits, cross-team meetings)
Documentation and data entry support (Hapag-Lloyd: booking reports, presentation prep)
MS Office proficiency (PowerPoint, Excel explicitly stated in CV)
Organisational skills demonstrated across multiple roles
missing_skills: No experience in construction/infrastructure project administration
No knowledge of MS Project (explicitly listed as required)
No German at C1+ level — role in German rail infrastructure requires strong German; candidate has B1
No commercial vocational training (Kaufmännische Ausbildung) — candidate has Master's degrees
No SAP-based purchase order or invoice processing experience in construction context
core_responsibilities: Support project teams in all project phases reliably
Office organisation and data maintenance in the organisational unit
Plan and coordinate internal and external project stakeholder appointments
Create project-related system evaluations for project controlling
Monitor invoicing, payment bookings, resolve discrepancies within team
Enter and maintain project data in specified systems
Coordinate procurement based on tendering plans with relevant interfaces
recommended_emphasis: Do not apply — this is an entry-level infrastructure/construction project assistant role requiring German C1+ and familiarity with construction project management tools
The candidate is overqualified academically but underqualified in domain-specific construction project admin
German B1 is insufficient for a working environment where all stakeholders, systems, and documentation are in German
The general project administration skills overlap but the role is operationally embedded in German rail infrastructure
summary: Match score is 20.0 (poor_match). While the candidate has transferable project coordination and administrative skills, this role is deeply embedded in German rail infrastructure operations, requiring strong German language skills (B1 is insufficient), construction-specific project management tools (MS Project, iTWO), and experience in German Bauprojekt administration. The candidate's qualifications are mismatched both directionally (overqualified academically for an Ausbildung-level role) and in domain. Do not apply.
